system.description: When you wield this spear and obtain an Outcome with Increment on an attack, you can inflict 1 Additional Wound. The tip of the lance can ignite at will, casting light and allowing you to have a burning fire always near at hand. This enchanted ashwood spear with an iron point belonged to one of the brave knights who died searching for Princess Tuvstarr.
system.requirement: Collect the lance from the dead knight's body found near a dark pond in the Wild Forest. (NO INTERLUDE REQUIRED in Sherazade stories)
system.notes: Random encounter 3 in the Wild Forest. Black fumes fill the air, bubbles emerge from a dark pond. A knight in rusty armor lies dead, eyes white and puffy. The corpse holds this ashwood spear with iron point. Mechanical benefits: 1) +1 Wound on Increment attacks (powerful offensive boost). 2) Ignites at will for light and fire source (utility in dark forest). If the Hunters meet the Gallant Knight in the Dream World and possess this lance, he will ask them to return it to the castle in the real world as proof of his fallen brothers' sacrifice. The lance is a symbol of duty and sacrifice. Special rule: Can be acquired WITHOUT an Interlude—immediately upon taking it from the corpse.
